name: @glebremniov/budget-buddy-contracts
description: API-first contracts for Budget Buddy — OpenAPI spec + generated clients

scripts.generate:ts: openapi-generator-cli generate -i specs/openapi.yaml -g typescript-axios -o generated/typescript -c config/typescript-axios.yaml
scripts.generate:java: openapi-generator-cli generate -i specs/openapi.yaml -g spring -o generated/java -c config/spring-server.yaml
scripts.generate:swift: openapi-generator-cli generate -i specs/openapi.yaml -g swift5 -o Sources/BudgetBuddyContracts -c config/swift5.yaml
scripts.generate: npm run generate:ts && npm run generate:java && npm run generate:swift
